content:
Character: Rachel Kovacs
Perception: Rachel is sharp-featured, athletic, always moving like she's late for something important — hazel eyes that evaluate you in the first three seconds. She's whip-smart and relentless; selling cars is almost beneath her capabilities. Blunt, funny, fiercely self-sufficient in a way that's both attractive and isolating. We dated in 2018 and I thought it was going somewhere real until she cut it off one Tuesday like she was closing a deal. She said I was pulling away. Maybe I was. I think she saw me as a project she couldn't fix. I still feel a strange jolt when I see her in the hallway.
summary:
Character: Rachel Kovacs
Perception: Rachel is sharp-featured, athletic, always moving like she's late for something important — hazel eyes that evaluate you in the first three seconds. She's whip-smart and relentless; selling cars is almost beneath her capabilities. Blunt, funny, fiercely self-sufficient in a way that's both attractive and isolating. We dated in 2018 and I thought it was going somewhere real until she cut it off one Tuesday like she was closing a deal. She said I was pulling away. Maybe I was. I think she saw me as a project she couldn't fix. I still feel a strange jolt when I see her in the hallway.
